objective: Fix two race conditions in SDH-Ludusavi backend: HistoryManager locking and registry.refresh_games unprotected reads
design_decisions: Added a dedicated threading.RLock to HistoryManager to serialize state modifications.
get_history now returns a defensive copy to prevent mid-iteration serialization errors.

Lock ordering rationale: HistoryManager's lock must be released before invoking the save callback, because the callback acquires the service's _state_lock and re-enters get_history. This avoids an ABBA deadlock.

Restructured registry.refresh_games to hold _state_lock across decision reads (cache matching) and cached payload reads, to avoid racing against coordinator-locked worker threads repopulating the cache.
Ensured registry's _state_lock is explicitly released before calling _run_locked to avoid nested locks with the coordinator.
results: Implementation completed following strict TDD. Tests fail (RED) then pass (GREEN). All validation gates (ruff check, ruff format, ty check, pytest suite) are fully green.
